title: Care A Good Keeper.
content:
Care keeps the conquest; 'tis no less renown
    To keep a city than to win a town.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Care A Good Keeper.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
